interface.shortDescription: Codex-native roles, skills, and safety defaults
interface.longDescription: Packages the openagentsbtw role system for Codex with reusable skills, installer-managed custom agents, hook scripts, and AGENTS.md guidance.
defaultPrompt: Use openagentsbtw to plan a multi-file refactor with Athena before implementation.
Use openagentsbtw to review recent changes with Nemesis and then run targeted validation with Atalanta.
